claim: Tier 7.7u locks the localization protocol for the low-rank state collapse. It declares 10 probe definitions, 7 required diagnostic model variants (no_plasticity, no_inhibition, frozen_recurrent, state_reset, input_channel_shuffle, per_partition_probe, trophic_probe), 7 diagnostic controls with availability status, and 9 outcome classification rules. Full causal scoring awaits model-variant implementation.
caveat: Protocol lock only; not full localization scoring, not repair implementation, not mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not public usefulness proof, and not hardware/native transfer.
